name: url-shortener-fullstack
description: Full-stack URL shortener (Express + MongoDB backend, React + Vite frontend)

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: npm run build && npm start --prefix backend
